parameters.query: SELECT value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key = 'project_picture' LIMIT 1

body.content: Report draft failed: LLM unavailable ({{ $json.error_message }}). Re-trigger when Ollama is back online.

nodes.name: Post Draft via Approval Gate (Sub-Workflow 02)
nodes.notes: Replace WORKFLOW_02_ID with the actual n8n ID of workflow 02 after import.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()

additionalFields.queryReplacement: ={{ 'action_log_' + ($json.draft_id || 'unknown') }},={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'client_report_drafted', draft_id: $json.draft_id || 'unknown', trigger: $node['Normalise Trigger Source'].json.trigger_source, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
